home.intro: Personal blog and knowledge base. I write about web development, React, Next.js, and the systems I build while learning.
home.contentHeadline: This site now behaves like a workspace

blog.title: Blog
blog.subtitle: Technical articles, project notes, and learning summaries.

search.placeholder: Search posts, docs, and review content

exam.heroCopy: This rebuilt frontend is organized like a real finals workflow: lock in the structure first, then drill concepts, practice questions, and short review cues.
exam.step1: Start with the summary to rebuild the chapter map.
exam.step2: Use concept cards to sharpen terminology and definitions.
exam.step3: Finish with practice plus review cues to close weak spots.
exam.studyFlowTitle: A smoother way to review this class
exam.subjectStep1: Start with the summary to rebuild the chapter structure.
exam.subjectStep2: Use the concept cards for fast definition and formula recall.
exam.subjectStep3: Finish the practice set before checking the review cues.
exam.conceptHint: Tap to flip and reveal the definition.

instrumentation.heroLine2: and get a buildable solution path
instrumentation.heroCopy: Use this channel to paste an instrumentation-style contest problem and receive a grounded solution draft built from the local distilled knowledge base. The planner itself stays local; image OCR is only used as a lightweight extraction assist when needed.
instrumentation.sidebarTitle: Give the model the details that matter
instrumentation.sidebarStep1: Paste the original problem statement or a concise but complete description.
instrumentation.sidebarStep2: Include measurement targets, signal range, and any special constraints if you know them.
instrumentation.sidebarStep3: The output is shaped for implementation: architecture, modules, risks, and verification.
instrumentation.inputTitle: What problem do you want solved?
instrumentation.placeholder: Paste the full instrumentation problem here, or leave this blank and upload a screenshot below.
instrumentation.imageHint: Upload a screenshot or photo of the problem statement. Images are compressed before upload, OCR runs only when text is missing or too short, and total OCR usage is kept under 10M tokens.
instrumentation.imageSizeError: Please keep the image under 5 MB.
instrumentation.imageReadError: Failed to read the image. Please try another file.
instrumentation.helperText: Recommendations come from the local distilled dataset. Token usage is limited to the optional OCR path, which now runs in compressed low-detail mode and stays under 10M tokens overall.
instrumentation.emptyTopic: Please enter a problem statement or upload an image first.
instrumentation.requestFailed: Failed to generate a solution. Please try again.
instrumentation.outputEmpty: No plan yet. Paste a problem statement on the left, then generate a solution.
